feedback_items.quote: Teal uses AI to generate bullet points and cover letters, which is more accurate than general chatbots like Claude or ChatGPT because it's based on my specific resume information.
Teal aims for a 65-75% correlation between the job requirements and the resume to appear authentic yet optimized.
Teal boosted my confidence and generated more attention from employers. It's easy to use and parses existing resumes well.
Missing feature: ability to pull information from a wider range of websites for job applications.

insights.title: Context-Aware AI Wins
insights.description: Users prefer AI that uses their specific data over generic responses

insights.title: Balance is Key
insights.description: 65-75% optimization maintains authenticity while improving results

insights.title: Automate Tedious, Not Creative
insights.description: Users want AI to handle repetitive tasks, not replace creativity

competitive_intel.description: AI-powered resume and job application platform

themes.title: Multi-Platform Presence
themes.description: Users expect web, desktop, and browser extensions

themes.title: Integrated Workflows
themes.description: Features should connect across user's journey
